label: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 7

extraction.one_line_summary: HARADA Jesus won from 6-rider breakaway after Trek Segafredo's climb attack failed to drop sprinters, taking victory on final throw against Battistella.
tactical_patterns: Trek Segafredo hammered mid-race climb specifically to drop sprinters but Bennett's team kept him in contention, nullifying GC team tactics.
Breakaway survived 50km descent despite only 2:28 advantage because tailwind favored escapees over chasing peloton reducing draft advantage.
Sprint teams (BikeExchange, Arkea-Samsic) chased hard through descent but abandoned with 10km remaining once break's survival became clear.

rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: survived Trek's deliberate climb attack with team support despite appearing to struggle, then won field sprint to extend green jersey lead
rider_signals.MERLIER Tim: negative: dropped on Trek-controlled climb and never rejoined, exposing vulnerability on even moderate altitude despite being top sprinter
rider_signals.WRIGHT Fred: positive: third consecutive breakaway appearance with podium finish suggests exceptional current form and aggressive racing approach
rider_signals.PEDERSEN Mads: negative: Trek executed team plan on climb to help his green jersey campaign but effort yielded no tactical benefit
